# Citable

Citable is the evidence and change-control layer for defensible search and AI citation readiness.

- Version: 1.13.1
- Release commit: 064bc52ae77b23c230b8c33fb542e0fb9a41646c
- Detectors: 123 across 18 namespaces
- Schema-validated registries: 27
- Agent providers: 12
- Canonical repository: https://github.com/mikeholownych/citable
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nebulacomponents/citable

Citable does not guarantee crawling, indexing, ranking, citation, recommendation, or conversion.
